dax_measures.Total Sales:
Total Sales =
    SUMX(
        Sales,
        Sales[price] * Sales[quantity]
    )
dax_measures.Average Order Value:
Average Order Value =
    DIVIDE(
        [Total Sales],
        DISTINCTCOUNT(Sales[transaction_id]),
        0
    )
dax_measures.Sales Growth %:
Sales Growth % =
    VAR ThisMonth =
        CALCULATE([Total Sales], DATESMTD(Sales[timestamp]))
    VAR LastMonth =
        CALCULATE([Total Sales], DATEADD(DATESMTD(Sales[timestamp]), -1, MONTH))
    RETURN
        DIVIDE(ThisMonth - LastMonth, LastMonth, 0)
dax_measures.Top Category:
Top Category =
    CALCULATE(
        FIRSTNONBLANK(Product[category], 1),
        TOPN(
            1,
            SUMMARIZE(Sales, Product[category], "rev", [Total Sales]),
            [rev],
            DESC
        )
    )
dax_measures.Revenue by Segment:
Revenue by Segment =
    CALCULATE(
        [Total Sales],
        ALLEXCEPT(Customer, Customer[segment])
    )
